articles.title: Korean Cultural Center Opens New Exhibition in Boston's Back Bay
articles.description: The Korean Cultural Center of New England unveiled its spring exhibition showcasing contemporary Korean artists this week at its Back Bay location.
articles.content: The Korean Cultural Center of New England unveiled its spring exhibition...
articles.author: Staff Reporter
articles.tags: Korean art, exhibition, Boston, cultural center, Back Bay
articles.excerpt: Boston's Korean community celebrates a major new art exhibition, offering a window into contemporary Korean artistic expression right here in New England.

articles.title: New Korean Restaurant District Emerging in Allston
articles.description: Allston is fast becoming Boston's go-to destination for authentic Korean cuisine, with five new restaurants opening in the past year.
articles.content: Allston is fast becoming Boston's go-to destination for authentic Korean cuisine...
articles.author: Jane Kim
articles.tags: Korean food, restaurants, Allston, Boston dining, kimchi
articles.excerpt: Allston's growing Korean restaurant scene is a must-visit for food lovers—here's your guide to the newest spots.

videos.title: K-Pop Night Boston 2026 – Full Recap
videos.description: Full video recap of the biggest K-pop fan event in New England, held at the House of Blues Boston.
videos.tags: K-pop, Boston, concert, fan event, BTS
videos.excerpt: Relive the magic of K-Pop Night Boston 2026—the biggest Korean pop music gathering New England has ever seen.

videos.title: Korean American Stories: Growing Up in Massachusetts
videos.description: A documentary short featuring second-generation Korean Americans from the Boston area sharing their identity stories.
videos.tags: Korean American, identity, Massachusetts, documentary, second generation
videos.excerpt: A touching documentary short about Korean American identity from young Bostonians—their stories will resonate deeply.
